# اتعلم بالعربي Pro | Et3alem Bel Araby

Professional platform for mastering languages using AI, Spaced Repetition (SRS), and Interactive Stories.

## Platform Facts

- **Name**: اتعلم بالعربي Pro (Et3alem Bel Araby)
- **Primary Function**: Language learning through custom flashcards and AI interaction.
- **Support**: 12+ languages including English, Arabic, Spanish, etc.
- **Core Technology**: 
  - AI Tutor: Real-time grammar correction and natural conversation.
  - SRS: Spaced Repetition System for long-term memory retention.
  - Interactive Stories: Context-based listening and understanding.
- **Scale**: Over 50,000 active users.
- **Data Stat**: Over 1,000,000 words saved by users.
- **Pricing**: Highly affordable, approx. 2 EGP/day (~$0.04 USD).
- **Target Market**: Primarily Arabic-speaking learners.

## Useful Links

- [Homepage](https://et3alem-bel-araby.com/)
- [Login/Start](https://et3alem-bel-araby.com/login)
- [Pricing](https://et3alem-bel-araby.com/#pricing)
- [Features](https://et3alem-bel-araby.com/#features)

## FAQ Summary

- **What is the platform?** A web-app for learning languages via smart cards and AI feedback.
- **Is there a free trial?** Yes, full 24-hour access with no credit card required.
- **How does AI help?** It corrects sentences, explains grammar, and provides 3 live examples per query.
- **What is SRS?** A smart algorithm that presents cards just before you forget them.
